title: GETTING STARTED
text:
This section contains the most basic commands for getting a workload
running on your cluster.
run
will start running 1 or more instances of a container image on your cluster.
expose
will load balance traffic across the running instances, and can create a HA proxy for accessing the containers from outside the cluster.
Once your workloads are running, you can use the commands in the
WORKING WITH APPS
section to
inspect them.
